---
title: ""
---



This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

```{r}
1 + 1
```

::: {.callout-note}
## Requirements
Before the workshop, please install the [R programming language](https://www.r-project.org/) in your machine. An IDE, such as [RStudio](https://posit.co/products/open-source/rstudio) will be useful but not necessary. 

Please install the `samplr` package in R, which you can do by running:
```r
install.packages("samplr")
```
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
This website is still under construction! Some sections might be empty. 
:::
